objects.name: Google Chrome security advisory (AV26-426)
objects.description: Serial number: AV26-426 Date: May 6, 2026 On May 5, 2026, Google published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following product: Stable Channel Chrome for Desktop – versions prior to 148.0.7778.96/97 (Windows/Mac) and 148.0.7778.96 (Linux) The Cyber Centre encourages users and administrators to review the provided web link and apply the necessary updates, when available.
